zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Harbottle於大約1438年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德霍頓時，她的父親Sir Robert Harbottle38歲，母親Margaret Ogle34歲。她於1464年與Humphrey Cole在英國薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1492年在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德瓦林頓享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Harbottle于大约1438年出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德霍頓时，她的父亲Sir Robert Harbottle38岁，母亲Margaret Ogle34岁。她于1464年与Humphrey Cole在英国薩默塞特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1492年在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德瓦林頓享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Harbottle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northumberland and Durham): habitational name from Harbottle (Northumberland). The placename appears to derive from Old English hȳra ‘hireling’ or hȳr ‘hire, wages’ + bōtl ‘dwelling, house’.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Harbottle was born about 1438, in Horton, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Robert Harbottle, was 38 and her mother, Margaret Ogle, was 34. She married Humphrey Cole in 1464, in Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1492, in Wallington, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Harbottle est née environ 1438, à Horton, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert Harbottle, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Margaret Ogle, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Humphrey Cole en 1464, à Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1492, à Wallington, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Harbottleが約1438年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドホールトンで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Harbottleは38歳，母Margaret Ogleは34歳であった。1464年にイギリスソメルセトでHumphrey Coleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1492年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドワリントンで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Harbottle(이)가 대략 1438년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 호르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert Harbottle(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Ogle(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1464년 영국 서머세트에서 Humphrey Cole(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1492년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 월링턴에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Harbottle родилась около 1438 г. в местности хауртон, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Robert Harbottle было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Ogle, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Humphrey Cole в 1464 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1492 г. в местности валлингтон, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет.
